description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build, Check, and Test that runs on every pull request. The workflow consists of two jobs: build_and_test and update_testmondata. The build_and_test job runs on a matrix of OS and Python versions, checks out the code, installs dependencies with pipenv, lints with flake8, checks codestyle and docstyle, and runs incremental tests with pytest. The update_testmondata job fetches testmondata files, moves them to the correct location, and pushes the updated testmondata file to the pull request branch.
